gates.detail: logged-out /orderstock -> 307 /orderstock/login; deep route -> /orderstock/login; /login 404; /orderstock/login 200; api/auth/csrf 200; NO double-prefix
CADDY_NETWORK, TLS_EMAIL, COMPAT_LEVEL all present, not fabricated

d_a2_verdict.claim: pages.signIn bare /login yields single-prefix /orderstock/login in production; no double-prefix

concerns.detail: AUTH_URL bare-origin (without subpath) breaks the signIn redirect to bare /login (404); recommended default (AUTH_URL unset) is correct. .env.example alternative guidance should be tightened to UNSET-only for subpath deploy.

Authenticated login sub-flow (login->/orderstock/, authed health, logout, ADMIN gate) not independently re-run under basePath: privacy hook blocks .env secret access in subagent context. Covered by independent 25/25 e2e (bare root) + execute-agent manual H1; auth logic byte-unchanged vs main.

known_gaps: H3 full 25-spec e2e under /orderstock (accepted CONDITIONAL; backlog stub basepath-e2e-parameterize_NOTE_08-07-26.md)
real caddy-gen reverse-proxy hop (on-host manual only)
still_required_before_verified: user acceptance of H1/H2 evidence + AUTH_URL-unset documentation tightening
4 Required-Input placeholder values resolved (caddy net, TLS email, SQL compat level, qtso matcher precedence)
